description: SettleMint and ADI partnership deck for FAB stablecoin initiative. Executive, commercial tone targeting ADI Head of Stablecoin BD.

slides.title: About SettleMint
slides.subtitle: Who we are and why it matters

slides.title: Built for Digital Assets
slides.body_11:
**Founded in 2016**
Headquartered in Brussels, Belgium. Global team of 100+ across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
slides.body_14:
**150+ Enterprise Clients**
Deployed across banking, asset management, central banks, and sovereign institutions across 30+ countries.
slides.body_15:
**Platform Company**
SettleMint sells a platform, not consulting. DALP is the single product: full digital asset lifecycle management, deployed in weeks.
slides.body_16:
**Regulated Industry Focus**
Deep expertise in compliance-first deployments: AML/KYC integration, RBAC/ABAC controls, regulatory reporting, and audit trail by design.

slides.title: One Platform, Full Lifecycle
slides.body:
DALP covers every stage of a digital asset's life, from issuance to redemption.

• Asset issuance: seven out-of-the-box templates including stablecoins, tokenized deposits, bonds, equity, and funds
• Compliance controls: maker-checker approvals, RBAC/ABAC, KYC/AML integration, investor whitelisting via ERC-3643
• Lifecycle management: interest accrual, coupon payments, redemptions, transfers, and corporate actions automated via smart contracts
• Interoperability: standard REST/GraphQL APIs for core banking, custody, and payment rail integration

slides.title: Sony Bank: Tokenized Deposits
slides.body:
SettleMint powered Sony Bank's digital deposit token initiative, one of the first commercial tokenized deposit programs in Japan.

Using DALP: full deposit token lifecycle on Ethereum with smart contract-based issuance, RBAC-controlled access, automated compliance checks, and redemption workflows.

Relevance for FAB: demonstrates readiness to deploy tokenized deposit infrastructure for a Tier 1 regulated bank, with compliance controls and operational reliability required by financial regulators.

slides.title: KBC: Digital Asset Issuance
slides.body:
• Client: KBC Group, Belgium, a Top 5 European bank
• Built a digital asset issuance capability for institutional clients, including structured products and digital bonds
• Belgium's financial regulator (FSMA) operates one of Europe's stricter frameworks for digital securities
• SettleMint's compliance-first architecture was central to KBC's ability to deploy under FSMA oversight
• Directly applicable to the CBUAE and ADGM regulatory environment that FAB operates within

slides.title: OCBC: MAS Project Guardian
slides.body:
• Client: OCBC Bank, Singapore, Southeast Asia's second-largest bank by assets
• OCBC deployed DALP as part of MAS Project Guardian, Singapore's flagship institutional digital asset initiative
• SettleMint provided tokenized deposit infrastructure enabling OCBC to issue and manage deposit tokens on a compliant blockchain platform
• Standards met: ERC-3643 (T-REX) for compliance, full KYC/AML integration, atomic settlement capability
• MAS Project Guardian is the closest comparable initiative to CBUAE's digital dirham program and FAB's stablecoin initiative

slides.title: KSA: Sovereign Digital Assets
slides.body:
• Client: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, regulated real estate tokenization initiative
• SettleMint deployed DALP to support tokenization of real estate assets for a sovereign-level initiative, one of the most strategically significant digital asset programs in the Gulf region
• Scope: asset tokenization with full compliance controls, investor management, regulatory reporting, and audit trail under Saudi Capital Markets Authority oversight
• SettleMint has direct experience in the Gulf regulatory environment, working with sovereign-level institutions
• This is not a market we are entering. It is a market where we have delivered.

slides.title: Track Record at a Glance
slides.body: SettleMint has delivered digital asset infrastructure for regulated institutions across four continents. Each program required compliance-first architecture and institutional-scale operations.

slides.title: SettleMint + ADI Together
slides.subtitle: A natural partnership for stablecoins and programmable money

slides.title: Complementary by Design
slides.body_11:
**What SettleMint Brings**
• DALP: proven stablecoin and tokenized deposit platform
• Compliance-first architecture ready for CBUAE and ADGM
• Tier 1 bank relationships: Sony Bank, KBC, OCBC
• Full lifecycle: issuance, servicing, redemption
• Delivered in the Gulf via KSA sovereign program
• Trusted ADI chain partner via Finstreet
slides.body_12:
**What ADI Brings**
• Strategic access to FAB and UAE financial institutions
• Deep knowledge of CBUAE stablecoin regulation
• Relationships with UAE digital currency builders
• ADI chain: purpose-built blockchain for Abu Dhabi
• Sovereign-linked credibility in the UAE

Together: the fastest, most credible path to deploying FAB's stablecoin on proven, compliant infrastructure.

slides.title: Proposed Next Steps
slides.body:
We propose a regular BD cadence with ADI: a structured partnership where both parties bring opportunities and align on a joint commercial approach.

**Immediate:**
• ADI facilitates a warm introduction to FAB's stablecoin lead
• SettleMint provides a tailored DALP stablecoin overview for FAB

**BD Cadence Proposal:**
• Bi-weekly or monthly alignment calls
• Each party brings 1 to 2 new opportunities per session
• Joint commercial framework with clear revenue share and co-sell model
• Quarterly review of pipeline and partnership health

FAB's stablecoin initiative is active. The CBUAE framework is maturing. The window is open.

slides.title: Stablecoin Lifecycle in DALP
slides.body: End-to-end stablecoin lifecycle from asset design through compliance setup, issuance, distribution, servicing, and redemption. Each stage is governed by DALP's compliance engine and smart contract automation, ensuring that every action from minting to burning follows the configured rules and produces an auditable record.

slides.title: DALP Platform Architecture
slides.body: DALP's layered architecture connects user channels and APIs to business services, smart contract execution, compliance controls, and identity management. The platform integrates with blockchain networks and external systems including core banking, custody, and payment rails via standard APIs.

slides.title: Tokenized Deposit Workflow
slides.body: The sequence from bank configuration through investor onboarding, minting, and redemption. Shows how DALP orchestrates each participant's actions.

slides.title: Partnership Model
slides.body: SettleMint's platform capabilities combined with ADI's strategic relationships create a joint solution targeting FAB, UAE banks, and the broader CBUAE ecosystem.

slides.title: Compliance Controls Stack
slides.body: The full compliance controls architecture in DALP: governance layer with RBAC/ABAC and maker-checker approvals, identity integration with KYC/AML, investor whitelisting via ERC-3643, jurisdiction controls, and a complete audit trail with automated reporting. This stack is what makes DALP ready for regulated environments like CBUAE and ADGM without requiring custom compliance development.
